ddls:
CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_code" INTEGER /* Code for the industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "sector_code" INTEGER /* Code for the sector the industry belongs to */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector the industry belongs to */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the industry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the industry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subsectors" (
  "subsector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subsector */,
  "subsector_code" INTEGER /* Code for the subsector */,
  "subsector_name" TEXT /* Name of the subsector */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the subsector belongs to */,
  "subsector_description" TEXT /* Description of the subsector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the subsector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the subsector was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subsector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsectors_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_code" INTEGER /* Code for the sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sector was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "naics_codes" (
  "naics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NAICS code */,
  "naics_code" INTEGER /* Code for the NAICS */,
  "naics_description" TEXT /* Description of the NAICS */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the NAICS belongs to */,
  "naics_hierarchy" TEXT /* Hierarchy of the NAICS code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the NAICS code was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the NAICS code was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("naics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_naics_codes_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the data point belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data point was collected */,
  "age_code" INTEGER /* Age code for the data point */,
  "num_firms" INTEGER /* Number of firms for the industry and year */,
  "num_establishments" INTEGER /* Number of establishments for the industry and year */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees for the industry and year */,
  "num_establishments_born" INTEGER /* Number of establishments born for the industry and year */,
  "num_establishments_exited" INTEGER /* Number of establishments exited for the industry and year */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, policymaker) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the visualization */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph, map) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the note */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being noted */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_notes_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_lineage" (
  "lineage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineage entry */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being tracked */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "lineage_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was updated */,
  "lineage_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the data lineage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lineage entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lineage entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_lineage_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_lineage_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gis_data" (
  "gis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GIS data entry */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the GIS data belongs to */,
  "subsector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subsector the GIS data belongs to */,
  "gis_data" TEXT /* GIS data for the industry and subsector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the GIS data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the GIS data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gis_data_subsector_id FOREIGN KEY ("subsector_id") REFERENCES subsectors ("subsector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gis_data_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry in the relationship */,
  "subsector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subsector in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., hierarchical, associative) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_relationships_subsector_id FOREIGN KEY ("subsector_id") REFERENCES subsectors ("subsector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_relationships_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "indicator_value" TEXT /* Value of the indicator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the indicator was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the indicator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_indicators_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)
